spec_match.rationale: The demo now uses the text-fit property with grow, shrink, and none modes from CSS Text 4 instead of the obsolete font-size: fit-width syntax.

interactive.rationale: The builder remains hands-on with copy inputs, theme selection, text-fit mode selection, base-size and width controls, live metrics, and generated CSS.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The parent card and concept lede now describe text-fit modes rather than the obsolete font-size syntax.

edge_cases.rationale: The page surfaces grow, shrink, clamped modes, disabled mode, unsupported-browser fallback, and runtime width/font-size metrics.

references.rationale: The see-also section now includes the mandatory ChromeStatus link, the CSS Text 4 section, and the explainer.

design_system.rationale: Adheres to the design system using appropriate CSS variables for custom colors and monospace styling.

summary: The banner builder now aligns with the current text-fit property syntax, includes the mandatory references, and keeps the interactive builder plus unsupported-browser fallback behavior.
